rules.title: Order Cancellation Eligibility
rules.instructions: Only orders in 'placed' or 'processing' status may be cancelled. For ineligible statuses call cancel_item anyway — the tool enforces the rule and returns the correct error. For eligible orders where item unit_price > confirmation_required_above_inr, call request_confirmation first. Otherwise cancel immediately.

rules.title: Refund Processing and Escalation
rules.instructions: process_refund handles amounts up to auto_refund_limit_inr automatically. Above that limit the tool raises an error and creates an escalation case — no manual check needed. Never disclose the limit amount to the customer; say only that specialist review is required.

rules.title: Shipping Address Update Eligibility
rules.instructions: Address updates are blocked once an order is shipped. The tool enforces this — call it directly and let it return the error.

rules.title: Cash on Delivery Refund Rules
rules.instructions: COD orders cannot be refunded in cash. Before calling process_refund on a COD order, ask the customer for an electronic refund method (UPI, HDFC Credit Card, ICICI Debit Card, or SBI Net Banking).

rules.title: Mandatory Escalation Triggers
triggers: customer claims they did not place the order
unauthorized order, account access, or suspected fraud
physical injury, safety hazard, or dangerous product
legal threats, consumer court, police, or regulatory authorities
explicit request to speak to a manager or senior agent
rules.instructions: Call the escalate tool immediately when any trigger is matched. Do NOT cancel, refund, or take any other automated action alongside escalation.
